next_steps: Send stool or serum samples for Clostridium botulinum toxin assay
Perform repetitive nerve stimulation and electromyography
Consider administration of Botulism Immune Globulin Intravenous (BIG-IV)
Consult pediatric neurology and metabolic genetics
Monitor for autonomic instability and worsening respiratory failure
Obtain serum creatine kinase and acylcarnitine profile
Review history for exposure to honey or dust sources
